overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban environment. The player moves from a covered area under an elevated highway, across a pedestrian crosswalk, along a shaded sidewalk with holographic advertisements, and approaches an outdoor escalator in an open plaza. The scene features vibrant neon signage, palm trees, and scattered NPC pedestrians in a high-tech city setting.

events.description: crossing the yellow marked pedestrian crosswalk with other pedestrians
turning right onto the sidewalk after crossing the street

agents.ego_description: walking forward across the pedestrian crosswalk under the overpass, surrounded by other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt walking toward camera across the crosswalk
pedestrian in white jacket crossing the street in same direction as ego

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass spanning overhead with green painted beams
large cylindrical orange concrete pillar supporting the overpass
cluster of blue and white garbage bags next to a concrete planter
broad yellow and black striped crosswalk with green WALK text painted on surface

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass with distinctive orange support pillars. The camera moves forward across a brightly marked yellow pedestrian crosswalk, sharing the space with multiple NPC pedestrians. The environment is semi-covered with mixed lighting conditions, transitioning from deep shadow to bright sunlight as the character approaches the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded sidewalk with holographic advertisements and palm trees

events.description: passing large holographic advertisement displays on the right building facade
walking past seated pedestrians on yellow public benches along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the shaded sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing palm trees and storefronts

notable_agents.action: person sitting on yellow bench using a device
pedestrian in white shirt walking toward camera

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying a woman's face with blue hair and cybernetic enhancements
tropical palm trees planted along the sidewalk in square cutouts
bright yellow seating benches where NPCs are resting

segments.scene_description: Walking along a shaded sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, the scene features prominent holographic advertisements on the right building facade, including a large blue-faced digital billboard. Palm trees line the walkway, and yellow benches host seated pedestrians. The concrete overpass remains visible to the left while the environment maintains a cyberpunk aesthetic with neon storefront signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with outdoor escalator and seating areas

events.description: emerging from under the overpass into the open plaza with visible sky
approaching the base of the outdoor escalator structure

agents.ego_description: walking toward the outdoor escalator in the open plaza, passing by seated individuals and approaching the stairs

notable_agents.action: individual sitting on concrete bench near planter

entered.detail: tall outdoor escalator with teal-colored sides and metal steps leading upward
steam or smoke rising from vents near the escalator base
large rectangular concrete planter containing bushes and trees

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a bright, sunlit plaza as the camera emerges from under the overpass. The outdoor escalator becomes the focal point ahead, with steam rising from vents at its base. Large concrete planters with greenery line the left side, while the holographic advertisements fade into the background. The environment shifts from shaded and enclosed to open and naturally lit as the character approaches the escalator stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the shadowed depths of a concrete overpass into a bright, open urban plaza. It begins beneath a massive highway structure with orange support pillars, moving across a yellow pedestrian crosswalk as the lighting shifts from deep shadow to bright sunlight. As the camera continues along a shaded sidewalk, the environment is defined by palm trees and vibrant holographic advertisements, including a large blue-faced digital billboard on the right. The scene then expands and opens up as the camera emerges from under the overpass, leaving the neon storefronts behind for a sun-drenched plaza. Finally, the view focuses on an outdoor escalator with steam rising from its base, flanked by large concrete planters under a clear, naturally lit sky.
